commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh But it came to pass at the time when Merab Saul's daughter should have been given to David, that she was given unto Adriel the Meholathite as his wife. If this were the case, the character of Saul is rendered more despicable and perfidious. David never reclaims Me rob, as he did Michol. (Haydock) All the children of the former were gibbeted, 2 Kings xxi. The latter was given to David for his destruction, like Cleopatra (Daniel xi. 17,) to Ptolemy.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
